notes: E007 was redesigned from risk_fraction optimization to target maintenance margin review. Re-run only E007 as E007A using --only E007 --output-alias E007=E007A. Evaluate 150 -> 180 -> 200 in order. maintenance_below_100_count > 0 is immediate NG. stop_triggered == true or maintenance_below_130_count > 0 requires checking the next higher candidate. Do not use the 120% line for adoption. Adopt the first safe candidate, not the maximum CAGR.
